title: Xtra Crisp Shandong Ground Oats Bowl
description: A briny and crisp weeknight Chinese dish from Shandong province, featuring ground oats and smoky flavors, perfect for a dairy-free diet

ingredients.name: ground oats
ingredients.notes: preferably rolled oats ground in a food processor

ingredients.name: smoked tofu
ingredients.notes: diced and marinated in soy sauce and rice vinegar

instructions: Heat the sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat
Add the smoked tofu and cook until golden brown, about 3 minutes
Add the scallions and cook until they start to soften, about 2 minutes
Add the ground oats and cook, stirring constantly, until they are toasted and fragrant, about 5 minutes
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce and rice vinegar
Pour the sauce over the oats and tofu, and stir to combine
Season with salt and black pepper to taste
Transfer the mixture to an earthenware bowl and serve immediately
